name: BEN_CIR_MAPPINGS_F
description:
BEN_CIR_MAPPINGS_F identifies which Payroll Component is associated to which
Plan or Option in Plan

columns.Name: CIR_MAPPING_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Legislative Data Group Id- LDG of the Payroll Component.

columns.Name: DIR_CARD_DEFINITION_ID
columns.Comments: Payroll Card Definition Id- Foreign key to  pay_dir_card_definitions

columns.Name: DIR_CARD_COMP_DEF_ID
columns.Comments: Payroll Component Definition Id- Foreign key to pay_dir_card_comp_defs_f

columns.Name: MAPPING_ID
columns.Comments: Payroll Mapping Id- Foreign key to PAY_GI_MAPPINGS

columns.Name: PL_ID
columns.Comments: Plan Id - Plan for which the payroll component is attached

columns.Name: OIPL_ID
columns.Comments: Option in Plan Id - Option in Plan for which the payroll component is attached

columns.Name: COSTING_METHOD
columns.Comments: Costing Method - Determines the method used to distribute the cost

columns.Name: DISTRIBUTION_RL
columns.Comments: Distribution Formula Id -  Formula for Cost Distribution

columns.Name: DEDUCTION_METHOD
columns.Comments: Deduction Method- Determines the method used to allocate the deduction

columns.Name: DEDN_DISTRIBUTION_RL
columns.Comments: Deduction Distribution Formula Id

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
